Fundraising for Candle Shops

• Built directly into your Shopify store

• Setup in minutes with zero code

• Reach new customers through your community

• Track every sale by campaign and participant

Add to your Store

Built into Shopify

Fundlet runs entirely inside your existing Shopify store. No separate platform, no extra logins — your fundraiser lives where your products already are.

  • • Installs in one click from the Shopify App Store
  • • Uses your existing products and collections
  • • Works with any Shopify theme

THIS IS THE BEST!!! Mathew is SUPER responsive! We launched our initiative and raised over $11,000 in less than a week! It works great, highly customizable. Self contained in house fundraising has never been easier. Especially if you are a shop and need to host multiple fundraisers.

– Popus Gourmet Popcorn

Simple Onboarding

Get campaigns and participants set up fast with built-in onboarding forms — no manual spreadsheets or external tools required.

  • • Add campaigns directly from your Shopify homepage
  • • Share a single link to onboard participants
  • • Works on any device

Sales Tracking

Know exactly how your fundraiser is performing with per-campaign and per-participant reporting built into your Shopify admin.

  • • Dashboard to track progress toward goals
  • • Track sales down to the individual participant
  • • Exportable reports

🌱 Built for Shopify Merchants — Install Fundlet and start your first fundraiser today.

Candles are one of the most successful fundraising products going — they have broad appeal, feel like a real gift, and customers are happy to pay a premium for something they'll actually use. With Fundlet, your candle shop can offer fundraising programs to schools, PTAs, sports teams, and community organizations directly through your Shopify store.

Why Candles Work So Well for Fundraising

Unlike discount products that feel like an obligation purchase, candles are something people genuinely want. That means higher sell-through rates for participants and more revenue per order for your organization. With Fundlet, you can:

  • Create campaigns around your most giftable scents and collections
  • Set a fundraising goal and watch progress in real time
  • Give participants a personal link to share — no catalog carrying required
  • Receive all orders through your normal Shopify checkout and fulfillment

Perfect for Seasonal Campaigns

Candle shops have a natural advantage for fall and holiday fundraising — two of the biggest fundraising seasons of the year. Fundlet makes it easy to spin up a campaign quickly so you can take advantage of seasonal demand when it peaks.

No Extra Platform to Manage

Everything runs inside Shopify. There's no separate fundraising portal to log into, no duplicate order data to reconcile, and no new system to learn. Fundlet adds fundraising on top of what you already have.

Install Fundlet on Shopify and start offering candle fundraisers today.

See also: Fundraising for Small Businesses for a full overview of how Fundlet works.
